review_title: Exciting option that we hope will continue to evolve!
description: In summary a positive experience that we hope will continue to evolve. This is a SaaS solution that deserves their place in the market, and we are excited to see what the future holds.
author: Roy Edvard E.
pros: As the Managing Director for an award-winning agency, we are always looking for new additions to our tech stack. Site Guru was one of many options that we considered as an alternative (and future replacement) for SEMrush, and we were without doubt positively surprised. This really is one of the best options available for hands-on SEO, and it will be exciting to see future developments.
cons: Leaves quite a bit to be desired compared to SEMrush, but that is not a fair comparison. Hopefully this company will continue to grow and develop, without going into the same pitfalls as SEMrush and other corporate/agency alternatives.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Go to tool for technical SEO
description: The interface is nicely designed. Reporting is crystal clear and easy to transmit to my SiteCare clients. The tool is also nice to work with, free of frustration.
author: Peter T.
pros: It gives search engine insights in an elegant and user-friendly way. The tool is nicely structured and the app is taken care of. Also, the reporting suits various needs, without enforcing elements to be included. The team also understands what real SEO is about.
cons: It only integrates with Google Analytics for insights into traffic. The tool does not depend on it, however. But adding an integration with a privacy-first tool like Simple Analytics would certainly be a bonus.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: I signed up for Site Guru but never received my assessment.
description: I rated this as neutral because I never go the initial assessment.
author: Rob J.
pros: The website sounded like it was easy to use and the assessment would take just a few minutes. The services that the website advertise were what I was looking for.
cons: I never got the assessment back from the website. I did get a couple of follow-up emails, but not the assessment I was promise.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I thoroughly recommend SiteGuru
description: I bought it, installed it and got to work straight away correcting all the issues and saw immediate improvements
author: Charles M.
pros: What I liked most was the simplicity of the UI and the ease of use of the solution. I have found it to be very easy to understand and put into action!
cons: I have liked the entire experience so far. I'm sure at some point I will start to find holes but it has given me a lot of improvements which I am already seeing results from implementing
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use, love the interface
description: I've been using Siteguru for a few weeks now and overall I'm very happy. It has made a meaningful difference to know what to do. Wish this functionality was included out of the box in web builders
author: Paola M.
pros: Siteguru has a great interface providing an easy to get started compared to other SEO apps I've tried. It's affordable and gives you actionable lists for everything, making it easy to know where to start and how to optimise the site. It also analyses the content of the pages to generate titles and descriptions, all that boring stuff. It monitors backlinks so you don't need to use a different app for that.
cons: - It generated descriptions in English for sites in other languages, though the content of the descriptions was correct. - Doesn't generate image descriptions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great well structured SEO tool
description: Very positive. I like that it is less cluttered than other options and that it is focused on being genuinely helpful.
author: Johan A.
pros: SEO made easy. For someone fairly new to the SEO game SiteGuru is a great choice since it is easy to learn and helps you prioritize what do fix first.
cons: Could be more clear which features are included and which is available as an add-on. Fewer features than some of the big SEO options, but that is also expected because of the lower cost.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Perfect SEO Co-Pilot for Website Owners
description: My overall experience has been fantastic. As a user responsible for our website, SiteGuru has saved me countless hours of manual analysis. It handles the technical Security checks and SEO monitoring in the background. It’s a reliable, user-friendly tool that focuses on actionable insights rather than overwhelming charts. It has definitely helped us improve our rankings without needing a PhD in SEO.
author: Sascha H.
pros: What I love most about SiteGuru is the Learning Curve—or rather, the lack of one. It’s incredibly intuitive. The Value for Money is unbeatable because it doesn't just give you raw data; it provides a prioritized SEO to-do list. The automated Search Engine Optimization audits are clear, and the interface is clean and professional. It feels like having a senior SEO consultant looking over your shoulder.
cons: I haven't encountered any significant Bugs or Issues so far. If you are looking for extremely deep Keyword Research or massive Rank Tracking across thousands of terms, you might need a more expensive, specialized suite. However, for site health and On-Page SEO, it is more than sufficient and much easier to use than the big-name competitors.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A clean, user-friendly SEO tool that doesn’t require expertise
description: I’ve been using SiteGuru for a few weeks now, and I’m very satisfied with the service. I have only a fairly basic understanding of SEO, and for a long time I wasn’t sure whether it was worth paying for a subscription. It seemed like I could manage with the native functionality of Google Analytics and Google Search Console, but at some point I got tired of constantly switching between interfaces and decided to subscribe to SiteGuru. So far, I’m happy with that decision: I can see everything in one interface, get recommendations for improving content, and what turned out to be even more important gain visibility into my site’s performance in LLM search results. At the moment, I’m satisfied with the tool.
author: Leanid L.
pros: I really like the simplicity and intuitive design of the service. It’s easy to use even for person whoa is not familiar with the service.
cons: There are several separate modules within the platform, and access to them requires additional payments.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool for technical audit with easy to follow recommendations
description: Great onboarding support, as I had an issue initially with Cloudflare blocking SiteGuru. I was able to quickly fix this with the help of chat support.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very clearly shows SEO issues that need to be fixed, showing the highest impact tasks first. SiteGuru helped me catch missing technical SEO issues, which I thought were being automatically added with a popular SEO plugin. I also like how it shows clearly other terms a page should be optimized for and low-hanging fruit opportunities that should help bump up a page to the top 3.
cons: None yet. There is a separate section for an additional fee that I may try in the future that could replace another program.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I would recommend it anyone that likes having a to-do list for their SEO.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like to see a list of items I can improve on. I like the ability to see links, page titles, meta descriptions, and more. It's a great value for the money.
cons: I took me some time to figure out to run another scan after making a bunch of updates. Overall great!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helpful and easy to use SEO tool
author: Stewart B.
pros: I've been using SiteGuru since Sep 2023 and it's been a fantastic SEO tool. The weekly performance report & daily SEO audit is easy to understand and help in analysing my website. It's a tool worth having in your digital marketing arsenal.
cons: There's nothing in particular at this time but more in-depth competitor analysis would help us better.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: ease and price
description: So fa so good, resulta are not immediate but I hang in there
author: Filippo G.
pros: Ease and price, I am not an SEO specialist
cons: I am not an SEO specialist so I would not know
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Best tool for checking and improving SEO rankings
description: This is my go-to tool for checking the current SERP rankings for my website - I use it almost every day.
author: Ben P.
pros: It has the clearest interface out of all the SEO page rank tools I've tried (and I've tested a lot!) For each of the keywords, it shows exactly which page on my website has the highest rank. And then for each page, it shows all of the keywords that page ranks for, and the position trend over time. The Focus Keywords section shows the searches per month, page ranked, average position and recent change, and gives tips on how to improve each page. Other really useful features include: Click through rate Competing content (to avoid keyword cannibalisation) Low hanging fruit (highlights what can be done to make the biggest improvements with the least effort) New keywords Lost keywords Content requiring attention Technical elements such as Indexation, Sitemaps, Canonical URLs etc
cons: It isn't a fully comprehensive SEO solution e.g. it doesn't check backlinks. But what it does, it does exceptionally well, and I use a different SASS for checking backlinks. Better to be Master of One, rather than a Jack of all trades and not do anything all that well, IMHO
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Easy to onboard SEO solution
description: It was very positive and I use it on a weekly basis. SEO solutions are a must for any sites that want to get trackings on Google Search and SiteGuru is a good way to get into the game.
author: Alexandre D.
pros: It was really easy to onboard. I've used numerous other SEO solutions they were pretty complicated to use. I got actionable data from SiteGuru right away, and was able to increase my Google search volume significantly over the next couple of months. But don't take my words for it, their free trial is very generous.
cons: They currently only draw information from Google Analytics. I would love to see support for other solution like Plausible.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SiteGuru Rocks! I probably need to get another subscription (LoL).
description: Fast, great support, and positive people.
author: Niko K.
pros: There is the ability to have unlimited team members. It gives good advice. (AS*) users have given good ratings. I can allocate team members to specific sites even on the lowest plan. Awesome stuff.
cons: Each plan is only for one site, but I am allowed to switch them out and replace them any time... so I only need an account that can do one or two sites at a time even though I may have hundreds of domains. Its workable even on a small budget.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Purchased on AppSumo as one of the best values ever
description: It's been awesome. I've used it on all three business sites I've had, and it's significantly helped me climb the search engine rankings.
author: Michael B.
pros: I'm not an SEO expert by any means, but I absolutely love how SiteGuru gives me a list of actionable items for my website. It's also great at identifying major issues. It's helped me climb the Google rankings in an organic way, which is much more sustainable.
cons: Only because I'm a novice at SEO and website design, it could probably be a little better about guiding me to solutions to the suggestions.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Makes SEO easier
description: I really like Site Guru because it makes SEO easier ans you can learn too at the same time. I use. it on a weekly basis and it really helps me
author: Elise H.
pros: Really easy to use and it really helps you with AI suggestions to improve .SEO. You also have suggestions that helps you go faster.
cons: For the moment I only use it for my company but if you want white label it's not so easy. To go further an automate correction will be the best :-)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent SEO Tool
description: This is a very valuable piece of information that highlights the effectiveness of this SEO tool. It's a great resource for anyone looking to improve their search engine rankings and optimize their online presence. Overall, this tool can significantly aid in achieving better visibility and reaching a broader audience online.
author: Lee D.
pros: This is very comprehensive, with valuable insights and detailed explanations that help site SEO management.
cons: I'd appreciate a larger budget because the information is so helpful for the pages it has already analyzed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great App for SEO in on spot!
author: Rob A.
pros: SiteGuru is easy to use, lots of different views to see exactly what will have a positive impact on your site!
cons: Actually I'm pretty happy with it. The sites are scanned weekly, the insights are on point, you get weekly updates and the site is easy to navigate
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Essential SEO Tool with Detailed Insights and Easy Fixes
author: Yousef M.
pros: How helpful the tool is in identifying SEO issues and providing SEO modification to our shop! Very helpful tool.
cons: So far nothing. Everything is great and it gives us a detailed view of our SEO performance and SEO audit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, Easy to Use and Well Featured For Basic Sites.
author: Josh W.
pros: SiteGuru is simple and easy to use and actively gets new features and updates. Pricing is reasonable. The core features tick all the boxes for simple SEO tracking and management of small/medium websites.
cons: Not as fully featured as other SEO software but getting more features all the time. Would be nice to have more keyword analytics and metrics as well as better competitor tracking.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Great software
description: I improved my ranking really quick. - I’m really happy with the results.
author: Carlos S.
pros: The easy way that it makes to simplify SEO.
cons: Is difficult to find something that you don’t like.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: very happy user
description: Amazing- I love it and would definitely recommend it
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use and highly actionable. It tells me what I need to do.
cons: Does not have much functionality with keyword research.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, Helpful Data
author: Jeff M.
pros: it adds so much value to my agency and my clients as it provides tangible data and insights into their performance and SEO standings.
cons: I haven't found anything that I dislike about the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Great Software, A must for site owners
description: It's the page crawl limits. I'm sure there's a valid tech reason why all the page crawls I bought can't be set up to automatically use what each site needs. Instead I have to allocate for each site and that can change often.
author: Kolleen S.
pros: This software gives actionable items for the user to make sure their website is as best as it can be for SEO and crawling.
cons: I think the only issue is that it is AI so there will be mistakes that the user has to overlook and know it doesn't apply to their site. For example, two H1s on a page. Rarely should this occur, but in those instances, you have to ignore it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
